confidence_notes: All skills extracted directly from explicit skills section and demonstrated through work experience at major tech companies (Stripe, Plaid, LinkedIn). High confidence due to concrete project implementations and measurable outcomes.

projects.name: Distributed Rate-Limiting System (Stripe)
projects.summary: Designed and implemented a distributed rate-limiting system handling 120,000 requests per second in production, supporting Stripe's $4B+ annual transaction volume.

projects.name: Billing API Microservices (Stripe)
projects.summary: Lead engineer owning 3 microservices processing $4B+ in annual transactions with optimized latency and high availability.

projects.name: Bank Connection Ingestion Pipeline (Plaid)
projects.summary: Built and maintained production ETL pipeline processing 2M+ daily bank connections using Celery task queue and RabbitMQ messaging.

projects.name: PostgreSQL Migration (Plaid)
projects.summary: Executed zero-downtime migration of 8 services from PostgreSQL 11 to 14 using logical replication, maintaining 99.99% uptime SLA.

projects.name: OAuth Token Encryption (Plaid)
projects.summary: Implemented end-to-end encryption for OAuth token storage using AES-256 encryption standard for enhanced security.

projects.name: LinkedIn Learning Recommendation Engine (LinkedIn)
projects.summary: Built backend features for recommendation engine with A/B testing instrumentation running experiments on 500,000 daily active users.

impact_highlights.description: Designed and implemented distributed rate-limiting system at Stripe handling massive scale with high throughput.

impact_highlights.description: Built and maintained production ETL pipeline at Plaid processing high volume of daily bank connections.
Executed complex zero-downtime database migration across multiple services while maintaining strict uptime requirements.
impact_highlights.metric: 8 services migrated with 99.99% uptime SLA maintained

impact_highlights.description: A/B testing instrumentation for LinkedIn Learning recommendation engine reaching significant user base.
Owns critical microservices handling Stripe's annual transaction volume.

confidence_metrics.confidence_notes: All skills explicitly listed in dedicated skills section. Work experience at tier-1 tech companies (Stripe, Plaid, LinkedIn) with concrete project implementations and measurable outcomes. No ambiguity in skill claims.
Projects extracted from job descriptions with clear evidence of deployment, production use, and quantifiable impact. All technologies mentioned are directly tied to implemented systems.
Impact metrics are concrete and specific (RPS, latency reduction, transaction volume, user counts). All claims are tied to actual work experience with measurable outcomes.
